horoscope: If you can manage it, this is a great day for slowing down and appreciating what you have, dear Aries, and generally taking things as they come. You have Jupiter in your home and family sector, in harmony with Ceres in your house of resources, boosting your sense of abundance. There may be more compassion and emotional support available, and you may feel a strong desire to pamper, give a gift, or otherwise show your affection or concern. If nurturing, support, and comfort are not as forthcoming as you’d like, take the opportunity to pamper yourself a little now. Also today, Mercury enters your resources sector, and during its stay until the 17th, you may be putting some of your recent ideas and enterprises into action or adding the details to plans. Applying new information to business and money ventures can figure strongly.

The Moon spends the day in your opposite sign, dear Taurus, putting the emotional focus on others, especially a close relationship, partnership, or another one-on-one scenario. Today is suitable for both freeform activities and structured learning and work, depending on the particular area of your life in question. Socially, allowing things to flow naturally works beautifully right now. You’re involved but giving others freedom and understanding, and this approach is most successful for improving relationships. Mercury enters your sign today and will continue this transit until May 17th. You have a stronger voice and are more likely to be heard and understood during this cycle. Self-taught endeavors can be particularly satisfying. Because Mercury rules your money sector, this can be a time of additional money coming in.

This can be an excellent time for supporting someone who needs assistance, dear Gemini. Opening your mind and making room for the unexpected is your best bet now. Gestures that stem from your sense of compassion don’t necessarily need explanation now. Today’s pace inspires patience, and it feels good to slow down just a little. Your ruler, Mercury, moves into the sign just behind yours, where it will stay until May 17th. This transit stirs a need to review recent events, ideas, projects, interests, and learning paths as you prepare for a new cycle in just over two weeks. Past issues or private matters are a strong mental focus in the period ahead. You benefit most from contemplative or meditative activities, research, and reflection now.

There is a distinct humanitarian tone to the day that deserves much of your attention, dear Cancer. Jupiter, currently transiting your sign and boosting confidence in your personality and presentation, is harmonizing with Ceres in your friendship sector. Friends may come through for you now, or you can feel entirely inspired by something happening in your networks. Your positivity is drawing others in now. Today's energies are good for generating ideas and making the most of new information coming your way. Also, Mercury begins its transit of your solar eleventh house, putting you in a good position for inventive thinking and fresh ideas until May 17th. Your mind is especially open, and communications flow smoothly during this over two-week cycle.

Behind-the-scenes activities can be healing, helpful, and entirely what you need today, dear Leo. Jupiter, currently in your privacy sector, connects well with Ceres, and getting the space you need to perform makes sense now. These days, centering yourself in private leads to much sweeter successes. The Moon at the bottom of your chart today reinforces the need to get extra rest so that moments when you’re “on” are all the more meaningful. As well, Mercury moves into your solar tenth house, where it will visit until May 17th. With Mercury transiting your career and reputation sector until then, you're inclined to think or talk more than usual about your life plan, career goals, opportunities, and responsibilities. Mercury is analytical and rational, and these qualities can be applied to these areas of life. However, when under strain, Mercury can also be nervous and fretful.

You may take some pleasure in allowing people in your life more freedom today, dear Virgo. This is a good day for forgiving and seeing situations and people through a more compassionate lens, but also for lending a hand and getting involved, even in small ways. Mercury begins its transit of your spirit sector today, joining the Sun there, although they won't officially meet until May 14th. Mercury will stick around here until May 17th, moving in harmony with your sign and boosting your communication skills. This transit shifts your focus outward and elevates your thoughts. You're entertaining big ideas and projecting yourself into the future, and this focus tends to help raise your spirits. You're less preoccupied with your practical affairs, and you are more courageous and spontaneous when expressing your opinions and sharing your ideas in the weeks ahead.

The Moon spends the day in your resources sector, dear Libra, and you seek some stability. There can be real solutions to uncover when it comes to your business, work, or other practical affairs, and the trick is to let them come to you. Allowing your intuition to come out to play works best just for now, and this might mean backing off from a problem temporarily. Compassion and patience are in larger supply than usual. Mercury moves into your solar eighth house today, boosting your observational and perceptive skills for over two weeks--until May 17th. The Sun is already transiting this area of your solar chart and now has company! You're more observant during this period. You're inclined to watch and learn rather than throw yourself into the action.

Emotional considerations tend to take precedence over material ones today, dear Scorpio, but you’re not afraid of hard effort when it comes to working towards your broader goals. There can be a nice show of support between you and a partner, or a sense that sharing beliefs and ideas leads to a deeper, much-improved bond. Your self-expression improves with a greater understanding of others. Mercury moves into your opposing sign today and will influence this area for over two weeks. The Sun is already in this area of your solar chart, and with Mercury here as well, there's a stronger focus on your interactions. It can be an excellent time to open up to a partner, significant other, or good friend. People in your life can help you get in better touch with your ideas, as communication with them seems to jumpstart your thinking processes. You don't have to agree with someone for them to jostle your decision-making. In fact, your reaction to feedback helps you better understand your own needs and wants. The potential for fresh ideas and thinking is strong. One-on-one settings are now preferred.

This is a good time for catching your breath, dear Sagittarius, as the Moon spends another day in the sign behind yours and the world seems to demand a little less from you! While life is likely to wind up again shortly, today’s aspects are good for temporarily letting go of material goals and concerns to aid healing. You can benefit from taking extra time and space for yourself, particularly if you need to get work done. There is good energy with you for doing something creative, notably a project or activity that requires devotion and focus. You’re also in a fine position to resolve a work-related problem with the opposite approach: by letting things fall into place and avoiding stressing over the details. Also today, Mercury begins its transit of your solar sixth house, where it will influence for over two weeks (until May 17th). This transit increases your interest in (and attention to) details, work, health, and problem-solving. The Sun is already in this sector of your solar chart, and quick-moving mental Mercury boosts your analytical skills.

Your interactions with others have a lot to teach you right now, dear Capricorn, and a key relationship can benefit from an open-minded and open-hearted approach. A helpful spirit can boost a connection now, as even the smallest gesture, if sincere, can shine. Also today, Mercury begins its transit of your solar fifth house. It will stick around here for just over two weeks, eventually meeting the Sun, and stirring great ideas for enjoying and expressing yourself. This transit facilitates communications, helping you get your ideas or message across, which is a real plus these days. Communications count for more than usual right now, and fortunately, sharing your thoughts comes more naturally and spontaneously.

Even small gestures today can help clear emotional blocks in your relationships, dear Aquarius. With the healing energy of the day, you can also find ways to improve your state of mind and sense of purpose or mission. It’s a good day for bringing some magic to a project around the home or at work. Strict attention to detail is not favored in this regard, but more freeform activities can fare very well. The Moon spends another day at the top of your solar chart, encouraging you to think big, or at least, long-term. Having a sense of where you want to be years down the road can help inspire or direct you now. Mercury moves into your sector of home and family today, where it will transit until May 17th. The Sun is already in this area of your solar chart, and now with Mercury here, you're even more interested in settling in and centering yourself. Still, there can be a lot of light activity on the home front, or more frequent conversations and thoughts related to your personal life.

You're in good shape for creative activities today, dear Pisces. Excellent energy is with you for sharing your ideas with someone you care about, as well as for showing your support for someone’s opinions, beliefs, or methods. Sometimes, offering your respect for a person’s ideas, whether or not you agree with all of the finer points, is just what they need and want from you. Bonds can improve today. Your mind is especially fertile with Ceres in your communications sector, and today, others are appreciating your unique perspective. You may very well help someone out of a jam with sound advice and encouraging words. Also today, Mercury moves into your communications sector for an over two-week stay, drawing out your curiosity, desire to know and learn, attention to detail, and ability to multitask. You enjoy a rather smooth, natural flow of communication during this transit, which is a real plus at this time when what you communicate has more impact than usual.
